channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Force Your MacBook to Only Charge up to 80 Percent (and Why You Should)
item.description: Laptop batteries lag in performance as they age. But you can slow down their deterioration by tweaking your Mac’s charging settings.

item.title: Fender Mix Headphones Review: Modular Over-Ears
item.description: Say goodbye to disposable headphones with Fender’s customizable and replaceable parts.

item.title: ‘I'm a huge music fan and I love the idea, but it’s not on the horizon’ — Samsung exec confirms Milk Music won’t be revived any time soon, and I think that’s a big mistake
item.description: Why Samsung’s defunct Milk Music was the Betamax to Apple Music’s VHS – and why I think it’s high time Samsung rebuilt its music streaming platform

item.title: Les surprises d’Apple (MacBook Neo, iPhone 17e), le projet Livebox Store d’Orange et l’avenir de HBO Max – Le Récap Frandroid
item.description: C'est parti pour le récap de la semaine pour rattraper les actus tech marquantes. Il y a eu des annonces Apple à profusion, un projet Orange intéressant et les dernières nouvelles sur le rachat de Warner Bros.

item.title: A Certified Sleep Coach Shares the Sleep Week Deals She’s Adding to Cart (2026)
item.description: From mattresses to sateen sheets, these exclusive deals on my personal picks can help you upgrade your sleep for less.

item.title: The Moka Pot Is the Best Way to Brew Coffee (2026)
item.description: Bialetti’s timeless design doesn’t just look good. It makes an incredible cup that’s perfect to keep you awake through the time change.

item.title: How to watch India vs New Zealand: Free Streams, TV Channels & Preview for T20 World Cup final 2026
item.description: All the ways to watch India vs New Zealand live streams online in the 2026 T20 World Cup final – for FREE – as the hosts go for glory in front of 80,000.

item.title: Amazon brade le prix de ce puissant robot-aspirateur 2-en-1 (19 000 Pa, 180 minutes d’autonomie) accompagné de sa station de lavage en retirant 33 % de son prix
item.description: Le Dreame L40s Pro Ultra est un robot-aspirateur capable d'aspirer les poussières, mais aussi de laver vos sols. Une fois son passage terminé, il rentre dans sa station de lavage pour un entretien automatique. Le tout chute à 599 euros chez Amazon.

item.title: Best Sunrise Alarm Clock (2026): Lumie, Hatch, WiiM
item.description: I’ve never been a morning person. This bedside gadget is the only thing that’s ever changed that.

item.title: Elle a découvert la matière noire mais n'a jamais reçu le prix Nobel : qui est Vera Rubin ?
item.description: Cette brillante astronome a transformé notre vision de l’Univers en montrant que la majeure partie de la matière qui le compose est invisible, ouvrant la voie au concept moderne de matière noire.

item.title: The Night Manager Series 3: Everything we know so far about the return of the Tom Hiddleston thriller — 'there's much more to come'
item.description: John Le Carre's much-loved secret agent, Jonathan Pine, will be back for a third series

item.title: Pay once and ditch ads for good — grab this $11 deal before midnight
item.description: Get rid of online ads for good with this lifetime subscription to AdGuard Family Plan, now only $11 through tonight at 11:59 p.m. PT.

item.title: This lifetime Microsoft Office deal gives your Mac six essential tools for just $60
item.description: Give your Mac a serious upgrade with a lifetime license to Microsoft Office Home and Business for Mac 2021, on sale for just $59.97 through April 12.

item.title: How to watch the 2026 World Baseball Classic online for free
item.description: How to watch World Baseball Classic for free. Live stream the 2026 World Baseball Classic for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: How to delete your AdultFriendFinder account
item.description: How to permanently delete your AdultFriendFinder profile or cancel your subscription.

item.title: Notre top 3 des meilleurs aspirateurs robots de mars 2026
item.description: Les différentes marques d'aspirateurs robots rivalisent d'ingéniosité pour développer des innovations. Voici trois modèles d'aspirateurs robots que nous recommandons.

item.title: Resident Evil : Requiem est-il jouable en cloud gaming ? Notre test sur MacBook, Steam Deck et smartphone
item.description: La célèbre licence de survival-horror revient avec un neuvième opus canonique encore plus effrayant que ses prédécesseurs. Voyons ici si Resident Evil : Requiem est jouable correctement en cloud gaming sur MacBook, console portable et smartphone.
